ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data is collected */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data is collected */,
  "economic_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic sector the data pertains to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Whether the dataset is publicly available */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_datasets_economic_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("economic_sector_id") REFERENCES economic_sectors ("economic_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "code" TEXT /* Region's code */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Region's continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country's data */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Country's capital city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Country's population */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Country's currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_sectors" (
  "economic_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic sector */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the economic sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "consumer_price_index" REAL /* Consumer Price Index (CPI) */,
  "industrial_production_index" REAL /* Industrial Production Index (IPI) */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate */,
  "seasonally_adjusted" INTEGER /* Whether the data is seasonally adjusted */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES economic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES economic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES economic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User's browser and operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES economic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES economic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the validation pertains to */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES economic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the action pertains to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Brief description of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* More detailed information about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES economic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
